Services

We offer fully customizable plan to meet
your unique requirements

Wedding Day

  • Starting from CAD 1,000
  • On-demand

Welcome to our spoiled bride service!

Elevate your special day with our expert hairstyling, makeup, and beauty
treatments. Enjoy exclusive access to our luxurious lounge while indulging in
complimentary coffee or tea with sweet treats. Relax with a soothing bath and
receive assistance with dressing. Pamper yourself and feel radiant on your big day!

Get a Quote

Party Time!

  • Starting from CAD 200
  • 1 - 2 hours

Your go-to everyday social make up

Discover our additional services! Elevate your look for any occasion with our expert
makeup and hairstyle services. From birthdays to corporate events, our team
creates stunning looks to suit your style. Book now and get ready to dazzle!

Get a Quote

Photoshoot

  • Starting from CAD 800
  • 2 - 3 hours

Be ready to create glamorous memories

Our Photoshoot and Editorial Makeup Service will help you shine in the spotlight.
We provide tailored looks to captivate the camera. Whether you're a model or an
influencer, we'll highlight your natural beauty with precision and style.
